ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm used */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the model in JSON format */,
  "train_precision" TEXT /* Training precision at 20k samples */,
  "val_precision" TEXT /* Validation precision at 20k samples */,
  "train_recall" TEXT /* Training recall at 20k samples */,
  "val_recall" TEXT /* Validation recall at 20k samples */,
  "train_f1" TEXT /* Training F1 score at 20k samples */,
  "val_f1" TEXT /* Validation F1 score at 20k samples */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training and validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment and its goals */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the experiment was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, machine learning engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment associated with the metrics */,
  "precision" TEXT /* Precision value of the model */,
  "recall" TEXT /* Recall value of the model */,
  "f1_score" TEXT /* F1 score of the model */,
  "train_accuracy" TEXT /* Training accuracy of the model */,
  "val_accuracy" TEXT /* Validation accuracy of the model */,
  "train_loss" TEXT /* Training loss of the model */,
  "val_loss" TEXT /* Validation loss of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being versioned */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
